Fello (Electron ACP Client)

Runtime
- Main process: src/electron/main.ts
- Preload (contextBridge): src/electron/preload.ts
- Backend Logic (Node.js): src/backend/
- Renderer (React + Vite): src/mainview/

IPC
- Typed contracts: src/backend/ipc-schema.ts
- Renderer API wrapper: src/mainview/backend.ts (uses window.fello from preload)

Sessions & Persistence
- Session metadata persistence: src/backend/storage.ts
- Message history is replayed from the ACP server when resuming a session
- Renderer state store: src/mainview/store.ts

Dev / Build Commands
- npm run dev (electron-vite dev; Vite server on http://localhost:5173)
- npm run build
- npm run preview
- npm run lint
- npm run typecheck
- npm run format

Repo Conventions
- Electron code lives under src/electron
- Backend logic lives under src/backend
- UI code lives under src/mainview
